findings.evidence: `rg` shows the docstring at line 304, while lines 305-308 add `[Module.Finite (ZMod 2) (ElementaryTwoQuotient G)]` and `[Module.Finite (ZMod 2) (ElementaryTwoQuotient H)]` before stating `twoRank G = twoRank H`.
findings.fix: Change it to say the ranks agree when both elementary-2 quotients are finite-dimensional, or otherwise explicitly mention the two `Module.Finite` hypotheses.
findings.issue: The docstring says multiplicatively equivalent groups have the same elementary-2 rank without mentioning that the theorem requires both elementary-2 quotients to be finite-dimensional.

findings.evidence: `rg` shows the docstring at line 169, while lines 170-174 require `[Module.Finite (ZMod 2) (ElementaryTwoQuotient R)]` and `[Module.Finite (ZMod 2) (ElementaryTwoQuotient S)]`.
findings.fix: Mirror the generic docstring fix by saying the ranks agree when both `Cl/Cl²` quotients are finite-dimensional.
findings.issue: The class-group wrapper repeats the same overclaim: the docstring says multiplicatively equivalent class groups have the same elementary-2 rank, but the theorem only states this under finiteness assumptions for both quotients.

summary: The new transport API is documented, but the two rank-invariance docstrings overstate the theorem by omitting the finite-dimensional hypotheses required for `twoRank`.
